description_long: This is a rustic wooden chaise with a robust, handcrafted appearance, featuring a thick, rectangular seat and a high, decorative backrest composed of uneven vertical slats. The armrests are solid and blocky, extending from the front legs and connecting seamlessly to the backrest, giving the piece a sturdy and substantial look. The wood grain texture is highly visible across all surfaces, with a natural, slightly stylized finish that emphasizes the organic feel of the material. The legs are thick and square, providing strong support and stability, and the overall construction suggests durability suitable for outdoor or park settings. The backrest has a gently stepped top edge and irregularly spaced slats, adding visual interest and a handcrafted charm. There are no visible cushions or upholstery, and the entire chaise is constructed from what appears to be solid wood.
description: A sturdy, rustic wooden chaise with a high, decorative slatted backrest and thick, blocky armrests and legs. The wood grain is prominent, and the design is robust and handcrafted.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the seat, the decorative slatted backrest, and both thick armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the solid construction of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest's stepped top edge and the irregular vertical slats, as well as the solid rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the armrest and leg structure from the other side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and features a stepped top edge with five unevenly spaced vertical slats, each with a natural, irregular shape that mimics hand-cut wood. The design is simple yet decorative, emphasizing a rustic, handcrafted aesthetic.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, which are thick, rectangular, and extend from the front legs to the backrest, matching the robust style of the overall piece.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, thick, and square, constructed from solid wood with visible grain texture. They are integrated into the frame for maximum stability and have no decorative elements beyond the natural wood finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the seat and backrest are made entirely of wood with a pronounced, stylized wood grain texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no cushions present; the seating surface is a single, flat wooden plank integrated into the frame.
